programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Jeremy Wade goes deep into the forbidding Alaskan wilderness to visit two large lakes where legend has it people have been vanishing without trace for hundreds of years. (HD)
The opening part of an interview with the former Republic of Ireland star, as Tommy Martin talks to him about his journey through football. (HD)
Henry, Gordon's ex-father-in-law visits, bearing an olive branch and making a bequest to the Ormerod family whilst Adam comes under suspicion when hospital funds are missing. (HD)
The weight loss regimes tested this time include the High-Fat, the Mediterranean, the Cookie and the Paleo, and a diet where a protein solution is fed straight into the tummy (HD)
In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series. (SL,HD)

After years of hurt and devastation Alan Quinlan finally got his hands on European rugby's most coveted prize in 2006 and in 2008 were he put in a man of the match performance. (HD)
Paul O'Grady returns to South Africa, Zambia and Namibia on the trail of young orphaned animals (HD)
Hotel Benidorm will take the viewers not only to one of the meds favourite towns, Benidorm, but also behind the scenes in one of the resort's most popular hotels. (HD)
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)
Carruth talks about his life inside and outside of the boxing ring. Including that faithful night in 1992, becoming the first Irishman to win an Olympic Gold medal in boxing. (HD)
Awe-inspiring, ambitious, and with an innovative, interlinked story arc that marks a first in natural history programming, this landmark series, narrated by Stephen Fry. (HD)

Jeremy Wade is lured to the shores of the Mekong River in Cambodia to search for a monstrous fish that has mauled and mutilated several people. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)
A real estate broker plays a message claiming her web designer agreed to return her deposit, while a cleaning-service owner says a former employee solicited her clients. (HD)
Brian Dowling and his fashion-forward design team are on a mission to prove that you can achieve the home renovation of your dreams without it literally costing the earth. (HD)

A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)
